tool.title: tool
tool.need_video.hint: You can add tracks by loading the video
export.title: Start writing
export.codec.label: codec
export.quality.label: image quality
export.quality.tip: Highest = Original video x 1.5x / High = Same as original video / Standard = Original video x 0.65x / Low = Original video x 0.35x
export.suffix.label: suffix
cap.warn: ⚠ This browser does not support some functions
help.title: How to use
help.basics.1: Drag and drop (or click to select) the MP4 video to the viewport）
help.basics.2: Create a mosaic track with the key or "+ Add" (automatically shifts to drawing mode)）
help.basics.3: Draw a mosaic area by dragging on the viewport
help.basics.5: Resize with corner handles and move by dragging
help.tracks.1.label: multiple tracks
help.tracks.1.desc: When multiple tracks are added, each has an independent mosaic area.
help.tracks.2.label: ●/○ button
help.tracks.3.label: corner handle
help.tracks.3.desc: Resize by dragging (changes are recorded as keyframes)）
help.tracks.4.label: Now playing
help.tracks.4.desc: The overlay border disappears and you can only see the mosaic.
help.privacy: Video files are not uploaded to the server. All processing is completed within the browser。
